plugins.name: pell
plugins.description: Pell Software's Claude Code toolkit: PR/local code reviewers (correctness, quality, security, test), repo-wide audits, Jira workflow ops (triage, start/finish work, precheck), ticket-to-PR composers, and a live visual scratchpad. One plugin, many skills.
